# Acreage Farming **ID:** acreage-farming-hero **Category:** Landing Page **Type:** landing-page --- ## рџ“‹ Full Prompt ``` Build a full-page premium agricultural website called "Acreage Farming " using React + Tailwind CSS v4. Use Playfair Display (serif) for headings and DM Sans for body text. Import both from Google Fonts. в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ COLOR SYSTEM в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ - Background: #f5f0e8 (warm cream) - Primary Dark: #0d1f0e (deep forest green) - Mid Green: #2d5a30 - Accent: #7dc47f (light green) - Gold: #c9a84c - Text Muted: #5a6b5c в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ SECTION 1 вЂ” FIXED NAVIGATION в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ Transparent navbar with backdrop-blur. Left: logo "Acreage Farming " in serif font. Center: nav links (About, Services, Portfolio, Events, Blog). Right: green CTA button "Get Started". On scroll, add dark background with smooth transition. в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ SECTION 2 вЂ” HERO (100vh) WITH BACKGROUND VIDEO в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ IMPORTANT: Use a looping MP4 video as the full-screen hero background (NOT a static image). Video URL: https://cdn.pixabay.com/video/2025/01/22/254016_large.mp4 HTML structure:
Content layout: Left side: - Eyebrow: "// Roots in Sustainability" (small, letter-spacing, accent green #7dc47f) - Giant serif heading: "Acreage Farming " (font-size: clamp(5rem,10vw,9rem), font-weight:900, color:white) Right side: - Description text about sustainable agriculture (white, 0.75 opacity) - Two floating badge pills: "$14 Billion" в†’ gold pill (#c9a84c background) "126,000+" в†’ glass pill (rgba white 0.1, backdrop-blur:10px) Animations (staggered fadeUp on page load): @keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(30px) } to { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0) } } - Eyebrow: animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease 0.2s forwards - Heading: animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease 0.4s forwards - Description: animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease 0.6s forwards - Badges: animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease 0.8s forwards (All start with opacity:0) Bottom center: a thin vertical line (1px, 40px tall, green-to-transparent gradient) with slow pulse animation as scroll indicator. в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ SECTION 3 вЂ” STATS BAR в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ Dark green background (#0d1f0e). 4-column grid: - "40+" | "Harvesting Legacy" - "190+" | "Topographies" - "126,000+" | "Farmer Partners" - "$14 Billion" | "Agricultural Output" Each stat: large serif number in accent green, small uppercase label in muted white. Dividers between columns. Animate numbers counting up when scrolled into view using IntersectionObserver. в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ SECTION 4 вЂ” ABOUT в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ Cream background. Two-column layout. Left: stacked images вЂ” Main: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1464226184884-fa280b87c399?w=800&q=80 Overlay (bottom-right, 6px cream border): https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1574323347407-f5e1ad6d020b?w=400&q=80 Right: - Eyebrow: "// Harvesting Legacy" - Heading: "Rooted in Tradition, Growing for the Future" - Body paragraph about sustainable agriculture - Dark rounded CTA button "Explore Our Story в†’" Fade-in-from-left / fade-in-from-right on scroll. в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ SECTION 5 вЂ” SERVICES "What We Do" в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ White background. Header row: left heading, right "All Services в†’" link. 3-column grid of tall image cards (aspect-ratio 3/4): 1. "Crop Consulting" https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1625246333195-78d9c38ad449?w=600&q=80 2. "Field Management" https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1592982537447-7440770cbfc9?w=600&q=80 3. "Yield Analysis" https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1472141521881-95d0e87e2e76?w=600&q=80 Each card: image fills card, dark gradient overlay at bottom, category tag + title in white serif. On hover: image scale(1.05), reveal short description with smooth opacity transition. в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ SECTION 6 вЂ” CINEMATIC VIDEO BREAK в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ Full-width 60vh ambient section using the SAME hero video as a second cinematic moment: https://cdn.pixabay.com/video/2025/01/22/254016_large.mp4 This is a parallax-style video strip between Portfolio and Event sections. Video plays silently in the background (no controls). Darker overlay: rgba(13,31,14,0.65) Center content (white, serif): - Large italic quote: "Farming is not just work вЂ” it is a way of life." - Small label below: "// Acreage Farming Philosophy" On scroll into viewport: fade in the quote text with a slow 1.2s ease transition. в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ SECTION 7 вЂ” PORTFOLIO в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ Background: #e8e0d0. Header: eyebrow + "Portfolio" heading + faded "//2023" serif watermark right. CSS Grid (3 cols, 2 rows): Large card (col 1, spans 2 rows): https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1560493676-04071c5f467b?w=800&q=80 Top-right: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1416879595882-3373a0480b5b?w=600&q=80 Bottom-right: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1574943320219-553eb213f72d?w=600&q=80 Each item: rounded corners, overflow hidden. Hover: scale(1.03) + caption overlay (location + project name in white). в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ SECTION 8 вЂ” EVENT CARD в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ White background. Single large 2-column card: Left: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1542601906990-b4d3fb778b09?w=800&q=80 Right: Dark green (#0d1f0e) panel: - Eyebrow: "// Event" - Date badge: "Jan 2024" - Title: "The Sustainable Agriculture Innovation and Practices Symposium" - Location + capacity in muted text - Green CTA button: "Register Now в†’" border-radius: 12px, overflow hidden, subtle box-shadow. в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ SECTION 9 вЂ” BLOG GRID в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ Cream background. Header: "Our Blog" + "View All в†’". 2x2 grid of white blog cards (rounded, hover lift shadow): 1. https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1523741543316-beb7fc7023d8?w=600&q=80 "Nurturing the Land for Future Generations" 2. https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1530836369250-ef72a3f5cda8?w=600&q=80 "The Journey to Organic: A Farmer's Perspective" 3. https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1574323347407-f5e1ad6d020b?w=600&q=80 "AgroTech Innovations Revolutionizing Modern Farming" 4. https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1607619056574-7b8d3ee536b2?w=600&q=80 "Breaking Stereotypes, Cultivating Success" Each card: image top, category tag, serif title, excerpt, date + "Learn More в†’" footer. в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ SECTION 10 вЂ” WHY CHOOSE US в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ Dark green (#0d1f0e) background. Centered heading: "Why Choose Acreage Farming for Your Agricultural Journey?" 3-column glassmorphism cards (rgba white 0.05 bg, rgba green border): рџЊї "Quality Assurance" вЂ” ISO certified, rigorous quality checks в™»пёЏ "Sustainability Focus" вЂ” Carbon neutral by 2030, eco-friendly methods рџ‘¤ "Expert Guidance" вЂ” 40+ years of agricultural expertise Hover: card lifts, border brightens, subtle green glow. в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ SECTION 11 вЂ” CTA SECTION в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ Full-width with background image at 20% opacity on dark green: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1500382017468-9049fed747ef?w=1920&q=80 Center: - Large serif heading: "Join the Agricultural Revolution" (italic "Revolution" in accent green #7dc47f) - Subtext paragraph - Two buttons: filled "Get Started" + outline "Learn More" - Floating animated leaf/particle effect using CSS keyframes в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ SECTION 12 вЂ” FOOTER в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ Dark green (#0d1f0e). Top accent border line. 4-column grid: Col 1 (2x wide): Logo "Acreage Farming " + tagline + social icons Col 2: Company (About, Services, Portfolio, Careers) Col 3: Resources (Blog, Events, Case Studies, FAQ) Col 4: Contact info Bottom row: copyright + large decorative serif watermark "Acreage Farming " в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ GLOBAL ANIMATIONS в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ Apply to ALL sections using IntersectionObserver (threshold: 0.15): CSS: .fade-up { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(40px); transition: opacity 0.7s ease, transform 0.7s ease; } .fade-up.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } - Stagger children: animation-delay increments of 0.1s - About section: fade-in-from-left + fade-in-from-right - Cards: scale-in from 0.95 to 1 RESPONSIVE: Fully mobile-responsive. Hamburger menu on mobile. Single-column stacking for all grids below 768px. Smooth scroll behavior on html element. No placeholder lorem ipsum вЂ” use real agricultural copy throughout. ``` --- ## рџ—‚пёЏ Sections Overview | # | Section | Animation | Images | |---|---------|-----------|--------| | 1 | Navigation | Scroll-triggered bg | вЂ” | | 2 | Hero | Staggered fadeUp | Unsplash farm aerial | | 3 | Stats Bar | Count-up numbers | вЂ” | | 4 | About | Slide left/right | 2 overlapping images | | 5 | Services | Hover reveal | 3 farm cards | | 6 | Video | Ripple play button | YouTube embed | | 7 | Portfolio | Scale on hover | Asymmetric 3-col grid | | 8 | Event | вЂ” | Split card layout | | 9 | Blog | Lift shadow | 2Г—2 card grid | | 10 | Why Us | Glow on hover | Glass cards | | 11 | CTA | Particle leaves | Full-width overlay | | 12 | Footer | вЂ” | 4-col + watermark | --- ## рџЋЁ Design References - **Typography:** Playfair Display (headings) + DM Sans (body) - **Style:** Editorial luxury meets organic farming - **Motion:** Intersection Observer scroll reveals + CSS keyframes - **Images:** All from [Unsplash](https://unsplash.com) вЂ” free to use --- ## вњЏпёЏ Customize Change these values to make it your own: ``` Brand Name в†’ "Acreage Farming" (replace with your name) Accent Color в†’ #7dc47f (swap for your brand color) Font в†’ Playfair Display (try Cormorant / Lora / Fraunces) Niche в†’ Agriculture (swap copy for your industry) ``` ---
